items.name: dashboard-shell
items.title: Dashboard Shell
items.description: Sidebar + topbar + content layout for backoffice dashboards. Composable groups + headerActions + user slot. Wraps SidebarProvider for collapse state.

items.name: auth-shell
items.title: Auth Shell
items.description: Page-level layout for login/signup/reset/verification. Variants: centered card or split-screen with hero panel.

items.name: settings-tabs-page
items.title: Settings Tabs Page
items.description: Left section nav + right content pane. Multi-screen settings (profile/company/team/notifications/integrations/privacy).

items.name: form-stepper-page
items.title: Form Stepper Page
items.description: Multi-step form layout with step indicator header + body card + Prev/Next footer. KYC onboarding / dispatch override / payout dispute.

items.name: list-detail-page
items.title: List-Detail Page
items.description: Master-detail layout for resource browsers. Resizable horizontal split or fixed-width columns. List + detail panes with optional toolbars.

items.name: finance-dashboard
items.title: Finance Dashboard
items.description: Mitra balance + payout overview + recent transactions. Banking-style featured tile, weekly target progress, Tribe revenue split, payout method cards.

items.name: finance-profile-settings
items.title: Finance — Profile Settings
items.description: Apex profile settings: vertical category nav + Apex ID + Profile Photo + Name + Email + Phone + Legal Address rows. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-company-settings
items.title: Finance — Company Settings
items.description: Apex company settings: Logo / Legal Name / Tax ID / Email / Phone / Address / Web Links field rows. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-notification-settings
items.title: Finance — Notification Settings
items.description: Apex notification settings: General / Method toggle stacks + Theme radio cards (Light/Dark/System). Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-team-settings
items.title: Finance — Team Settings
items.description: Apex team settings: filter row + Invite CTA + Members table (name/email/last-activity/role). Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-privacy-security
items.title: Finance — Privacy & Security
items.description: Apex privacy/security: Change Password / Backup Codes / 2FA / Active Sessions rows + sessions table. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-integration-settings
items.title: Finance — Integration Settings
items.description: Apex integrations: segmented filter [All/Connected/Disconnected] + Search/Filter/Sort + 3-column app grid. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-localization-settings
items.title: Finance — Localization Settings
items.description: Apex localization: Language / Currency / Timezone / Date Format field rows. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-register
items.title: Finance — Register
items.description: Apex centered-card register with live password rule checklist + strength bar. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-reset-password
items.title: Finance — Reset Password
items.description: Apex single-email reset card with try-another-method fallback. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-email-verification
items.title: Finance — Email Verification
items.description: Apex 4-digit OTP verification with resend link. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: finance-my-card-detail
items.title: Finance — My Card Detail
items.description: Apex card detail: gradient preview + info grid (Card Number/Expiry/CVC/Spending Limit) + action row + recent transactions list. Ported from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: hr-dashboard
items.title: HR Management — Dashboard
items.description: Synergy HR home dashboard ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma. Status Tracker + Notes + Today's Schedule + Time Off gauge + Current Project.

items.name: hr-calendar
items.title: HR Management — Calendar
items.description: Weekly schedule view with upcoming event cards + 5-day grid with event blocks. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: hr-teams
items.title: HR Management — Teams
items.description: Member directory table with avatar + title + project + document + status. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: hr-profile-settings
items.title: HR Management — Profile Settings
items.description: Settings page with vertical tab nav and Profile/Contact/Social/Export/General/Company/Notifications/Privacy panels. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: hr-login
items.title: HR Management — Login
items.description: Split-screen login (brand + form + social SSO) with Time Off promo card on right. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: hr-register
items.title: HR Management — Register
items.description: Split-screen register with live password rule checklist + social SSO. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: hr-reset-password
items.title: HR Management — Reset Password
items.description: Single-field email reset with try-another-method fallback. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma.

items.name: hr-get-started
items.title: HR Management — Get Started
items.description: Single-column onboarding entry — social SSO + email + T&C + Get Started CTA. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3903:28634.

items.name: hr-personal-information
items.title: HR Management — Personal Information
items.description: Onboarding step 1/5 — Full Name + Username + Phone with country prefix + horizontal step indicator. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3903:29361.

items.name: hr-role-selection
items.title: HR Management — Role Selection
items.description: Onboarding step 2/5 — two radio cards (Employee / Employer). Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3904:29701.

items.name: hr-position-selection
items.title: HR Management — Position Selection
items.description: Onboarding step 3/5 — Department + Title selects + Biography textarea + Skip link. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3904:29920.

items.name: hr-password-setup
items.title: HR Management — Password Setup
items.description: Onboarding step 4/5 — create + confirm password with live rule checklist. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3908:30106.

items.name: hr-complete-onboarding
items.title: HR Management — Complete Onboarding
items.description: Onboarding step 5/5 — 5-row read-only summary with edit pencil per row + Complete CTA. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3908:30330.

items.name: hr-enter-verification
items.title: HR Management — Enter Verification
items.description: Split-screen verification with 4-digit OTP + Resend + Time Off promo right column. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3903:26321.

items.name: hr-general-settings
items.title: HR Management — General Settings
items.description: Settings page with General active panel (Regional Preferences + Theme Options). Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3880:69995.

items.name: hr-company-settings
items.title: HR Management — Company Settings
items.description: Settings page with Company active panel (logo + name + website + slogan + description). Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3892:85576.

items.name: hr-notification-settings
items.title: HR Management — Notification Settings
items.description: Settings page with Notification active panel — 3 toggle rows + Upgrade promo block. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3892:87292.

items.name: hr-privacy-security
items.title: HR Management — Privacy & Security
items.description: Settings page with Privacy & Security active panel — Change Password sub-tab with live rule checklist. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3893:89081.

items.name: hr-integrations-settings
items.title: HR Management — Integrations Settings
items.description: Settings page with Integrations active panel — 4 connected apps + sub-tabs + Add Integration CTA. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3895:91151.

items.name: hr-integrations
items.title: HR Management — Integrations
items.description: Standalone integrations marketplace — segmented filter + search + 6 Available apps + 3 Upcoming apps grid. Ported 1:1 from AlignUI Pro Figma node 3880:63624.

items.name: marketing-dashboard
items.title: Marketing Dashboard
items.description: Tribe initiative performance. KPI grid + conversion trend chart (stacked bars) + funnel + campaign table + region/channel attribution.

items.name: utils
items.title: cn utility
items.description: Tailwind class merge helper for Dash Design System.

items.name: stack-detector
items.title: Dash repo stack detector
items.description: Inspects a consumer repo and identifies which of the 5 Dash FE stacks it matches (portal-v2, backoffice, halo-fe, basecamp, fleet-mgmt) or `unknown`. Pure filesystem inspection — no network, no spawn. Used by `dash init` and the Adaptation Layer to auto-select the right per-repo rule set.

items.name: file-upload
items.title: File Upload
items.description: Dropzone + file list + image upload. Dropzone supports drag-drop + browse, 3 sizes, idle/active/error/disabled states, accept filter, max size guard. FileUploadItem with progress / complete / error states. ImageUpload with avatar/photo preview, Change + Remove buttons.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Action menu built on Radix DropdownMenu. Item / RichItem (icon + label + description) / CheckboxItem / RadioItem / Sub / Label / Separator / Shortcut. Destructive item variant.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Hover/focus tooltip built on Radix Tooltip. 3 sizes (xs/sm/md), side+align positioning, custom animations matching Dash motion tokens.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Form field label with required asterisk + optional hint slot. text-strong-950 default, muted hint.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Binary toggle built on Radix Switch. 3 sizes (sm/md/lg), primary tone, thumb shadow.

items.name: radio
items.title: Radio
items.description: Mutually exclusive selection built on Radix RadioGroup. RadioGroup + RadioItem + RadioField (composed wrapper with label + description). 3 sizes.

items.name: tag
items.title: Tag
items.description: Compact chip with optional icon and remove button. 3 variants (stroke/gray/primary), 3 sizes, dismissable.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Side-panel modal sliding from any edge. 4 sides (right/left/top/bottom) × 5 sizes (sm/md/lg/xl/full). Composable parts: Header, Title, Description, Body, Footer.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Date grid built on react-day-picker 10. Headless behavior, Dash-styled day cells, range selection, dropdown caption.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: Calendar dropdown wrapped in Popover. Single date and range variants plus DatePickerTrigger button. Built on Calendar + Radix Popover + date-fns format.

items.name: command
items.title: Command Menu
items.description: Searchable command palette built on cmdk. Composable parts (Input, List, Empty, Group, Item, Separator, Shortcut, Kbd) plus CommandDialog wrapper for cmd+K modal pattern.

items.name: divider
items.title: Divider
items.description: Horizontal or vertical 1px rule (Divider) plus content-aware separator with center label or icon (ContentDivider). Built on Radix Separator.

items.name: color-picker
items.title: Color Picker
items.description: Hex color picker built on react-colorful. Saturation square + hue slider + hex input + optional preset row. Plus ColorSwatch trigger button for popover use.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Boolean toggle built on Radix Checkbox. 3 sizes (sm/md/lg), primary + destructive tones, indeterminate state, plus CheckboxField composition with label + description.

items.name: bulk-action-bar
items.title: Bulk Action Bar
items.description: Sticky multi-select action toolbar. Appears when ≥1 row is selected in a DataTable. 3 tones (neutral/primary/destructive) × 2 sizes (sm/md). Position top or bottom. Destructive actions gated by confirmation. Mobile-collapses overflow into DropdownMenu.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: Wrap multiple Buttons in a unified row or column. Attached mode merges borders so the group reads as one control; detached mode adds gap. Optional separator divider for ghost-style groups.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Primary action trigger. 3 tones (primary/neutral/destructive) × 6 styles (filled/stroke/light/lighter/ghost/link) × 5 sizes (xs/sm/md/lg/xl) plus icon-only sizes. Loading state, leftIcon/rightIcon props, asChild for router-link forwarding.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Hierarchy navigation. Composable parts (List, Item, Link, Page, Separator, Ellipsis) with 3 separator variants (chevron, slash, dot).

items.name: banner
items.title: Banner
items.description: Full-width status banner — pinned to the top of a page or app shell. Same status × style matrix as Alert (6 statuses × 4 styles × 2 sizes). Optional title, action, dismiss.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Inline tag for status, count, label. 6 statuses (error/warning/success/information/feature/neutral) × 4 styles (filled/stroke/light/lighter) × 3 sizes. Includes StatusBadge variant with dot + optional pulse.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: User avatar with image + initials fallback. Supports 7 sizes, circle/rounded shape, top/bottom status indicators (online/away/busy/offline), and grouping with overflow count.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Inline alert banner with 5 statuses (error, warning, success, information, feature), 4 styles (filled, stroke, light, lighter), and 3 sizes. Same anatomy used for Notification (corner) and Toast (stacked).

items.name: toaster
items.title: Toaster
items.description: Sonner-based toast system with Dash visual tokens. Mount once at app root, call toast.success / toast.error / featureToast from anywhere.

items.name: activity-feed
items.title: Activity Feed
items.description: Composable activity stream — chronological list with avatar, action, timestamp, and item-types (file attachment, comment, task progress, filter chip).

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Slide-by-slide content browser built on embla-carousel-react. Composable Carousel/Content/Item/Previous/Next + useCarousel() hook. Horizontal + vertical orientation.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Recharts wrapper with Dash token-aware theming. ChartContainer + ChartTooltip + ChartTooltipContent + ChartLegend + ChartLegendContent + useChart() + ChartConfig type.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Sortable + filterable + paginated table built on TanStack Table v8. Pair with Pagination + Filter for full list-page UX.

items.name: progress-circle
items.title: Progress Circle
items.description: Compact circular progress for inline indicators. 5 tones, configurable size + stroke. For full-width progress use Progress Bar.

items.name: social-button
items.title: Social Button
items.description: Branded OAuth sign-in button. 6 brands (Google/Apple/GitHub/Facebook/Twitter/Microsoft) × 4 sizes. Auto label + icon, overrideable.

items.name: fancy-button
items.title: Fancy Button
items.description: Gradient + lifted shadow + inner ring marketing CTA. 4 tones × 4 sizes. For everyday actions use Button.

items.name: dot-stepper
items.title: Dot Stepper
items.description: Minimal dot-based progress for short flows (3-5 steps) — onboarding, tutorial, carousel. For full step UI use Step Indicator.

items.name: use-mobile
items.title: useMobile
items.description: Returns true when viewport < md breakpoint (default 768px). Matches Tailwind md: media query.

items.name: use-debounce
items.title: useDebounce
items.description: Debounce a value or a callback. useDebounce(value, delay) returns debounced value; useDebouncedCallback(fn, delay) returns debounced callback.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: Vanilla useState + hand-rolled validation. No external form lib. Exports useDashForm hook + Form/FormField/FormItem/FormLabel/FormControl/FormDescription/FormMessage + useFormField + validateForm helper. Matches Dash AI rules (no react-hook-form, no zod).

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Lightweight form-row primitive without RHF coupling. Field / FieldRow / FieldGroup / FieldDescription. Use when wiring forms manually.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: Single-character segmented input for one-time codes built on input-otp. InputOTP/Group/Slot/Separator. Use for KYC, MFA, payout dispute approval.

items.name: stat
items.title: Stat
items.description: KPI tile primitive. Label + value + trend (up/down/neutral) + description. Bare or wrap in Card.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Keyboard key glyph. 3 sizes. Pair with Command Menu hints, Tooltip shortcuts, settings docs.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Right-click menu built on Radix ContextMenu. Item/CheckboxItem/RadioItem/Sub/Label/Separator/Shortcut. Destructive item variant.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: Persistent horizontal menubar built on Radix Menubar. Use for power-user desktop shells (File/Edit/View pattern).

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: Top-level horizontal nav with hover mega-menus built on Radix NavigationMenu. Use for marketing site + multi-product shell.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Composable shell rail. SidebarProvider/Sidebar/Header/Content/Footer/Group/GroupLabel/Item/Trigger/Inset + useSidebar() hook. Pair with Sheet for mobile.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Searchable single-select. Composed from Popover + Command. For small known sets use Select instead.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio
items.description: Lock container to fixed width:height ratio via Radix AspectRatio. Prevents layout shift for image / video / map slots.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Single-section show/hide built on Radix Collapsible. For multi-section grouped accordion behavior use Accordion.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Splitter for two or more panels with draggable handles. Built on react-resizable-panels. Horizontal + vertical direction.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Generic large side panel built on Radix Dialog. 4 sides × 5 sizes. Desktop counterpart to Drawer.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Confirmation modal for destructive or irreversible actions. No overlay-click dismiss. Built on Radix AlertDialog.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Stateful 2-state button built on Radix Toggle. 2 variants (default/outline) × 3 sizes. Use for formatting toolbar, feature flags, sticky-pin controls.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: Set of related Toggle buttons sharing selection state built on Radix ToggleGroup. single + multiple modes. Inherits variant/size from group.

items.name: icon-button
items.title: Icon Button
items.description: Square-format icon-only button. 5 sizes × 3 tones × 3 styles. aria-label required. Pair with Tooltip when icon meaning is ambiguous.

items.name: compact-button
items.title: Compact Button
items.description: Mini icon button (20-24px) for close, dismiss, in-cell row action. 4 styles (stroke/ghost/white/modifiable) × 2 sizes × fullRadius toggle. aria-label required.

items.name: link-button
items.title: Link Button
items.description: Inline anchor styled as a button-like link. 4 tones × 3 sizes × 3 underline modes. Use asChild with Next/Link for navigation.

items.name: hint
items.title: Hint
items.description: Inline helper text below form fields. 5 tones (neutral/success/warning/error/information) with auto-icon, optional hideIcon for dense rows.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Indeterminate loading indicator. 5 sizes × 4 tones. role=status live region for screen readers.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Shape placeholder during fetch. 3 shapes (rect/circle/text). Honors prefers-reduced-motion via Tailwind animate-pulse.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Surface container. 3 variants (stroke/elevated/ghost) × 4 padding sizes. Composable Header/Title/Description/Content/Footer/Media.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: Zero-data state with icon + title + description + actions. 3 sizes. Always pair with a recovery action (reset filter, create new).

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: Non-modal preview on hover or focus built on Radix HoverCard. Skip on mobile — use Popover/Drawer there.

items.name: filter
items.title: Filter
items.description: Multi-select dropdown filter chip. Composed from Popover + Command + Tag. Drop in above tables for tribe/status/city/zone narrowing.

items.name: time-picker
items.title: Time Picker
items.description: 24-hour time input (HH:MM). Pair with Date Picker for full datetime.

items.name: rich-editor
items.title: Rich Editor
items.description: Tiptap-powered rich text editor with Dash-styled toolbar. StarterKit + Link + Placeholder extensions wired. Use for suspend reason, complaint reply, internal comment.

items.name: step-indicator
items.title: Step Indicator
items.description: Progress through a known sequence. Horizontal or vertical orientation. 3 states (completed/current/upcoming) with connector line.

items.name: segmented-control
items.title: Segmented Control
items.description: Visually grouped single-select built on Radix ToggleGroup. 3 sizes. Lighter than Tabs — for toolbar / control / filter use (no associated content panel).

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Primitive HTML table parts (Table/Header/Body/Footer/Row/Head/Cell/Caption). Bring your own data + sorting. For column resize / virtualization / multi-sort use Data Table.

items.name: rating
items.title: Rating
items.description: Star rating input. 3 sizes, half-step support, read-only display mode.

items.name: notification-feed
items.title: Notification Feed
items.description: Persistent list of system notifications. NotificationFeed/Item/Group with unread dot, icon slot, timestamp, action row. Mount inside popover or drawer.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Horizontal section switcher built on Radix Tabs. 2 variants (line/pill). Composable Root/List/Trigger/Content with keyboard nav.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Numeric range input built on Radix Slider. Single or multi-thumb (range). Keyboard arrows / home / end / page-up / page-down all wired.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Single-line text field with composable parts (InputRoot, Input, InputIcon, InputAffix). 4 sizes (sm/md/lg/xl). Focus / hover / disabled / invalid state on the root container.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multi-line text field with invalid + disabled states. Tokenized borders, ring, and resize handle.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Cross-browser custom scrollbar built on Radix ScrollArea. Use inside sidebars, drawers, and long list panels.

items.name: modal
items.title: Modal
items.description: Centered dialog built on Radix Dialog. Modal/Trigger/Close/Portal/Overlay/Content (5 sizes sm-2xl)/Header/Title/Description/Body/Footer. Focus-trap, ESC closes, scroll-lock.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Non-modal floating panel anchored to a trigger. Built on Radix Popover. Composable Root/Trigger/Anchor/Close/Content. Use for inline form / settings / contextual editor (not action lists — use Dropdown Menu).

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Single-choice dropdown built on Radix Select. SelectTrigger/Value/Content/Group/Label/Item/Separator/ScrollUpButton/ScrollDownButton. For searchable or huge lists use Combobox.

items.name: progress-bar
items.title: Progress Bar
items.description: Determinate progress indicator built on Radix Progress. 3 sizes (sm/md/lg), 5 tones (primary/success/warning/error/information). For indeterminate work use Spinner.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Page-by-page navigation. Composable Pagination/List/Item/Button/Previous/Next/Ellipsis. Headless behavior — bring your own page state. Renders aria-current='page' on active.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Collapsible content sections built on Radix Accordion. Supports single/multiple modes, chevron or plus-minus icons, left or right icon placement.

items.name: base-theme
items.title: Dash Base Theme
items.description: Full Dash token system. Semantic tier (bg/text/stroke/icon × strong/sub/soft/disabled/weak/white) + state colors (success/warning/error/information/feature/away/faded × dark/base/light/lighter) + 11 color scales (gray/slate/blue/orange/red/green/yellow/purple/sky/pink/teal) + shadow + radius + motion tokens. Writes consumer's app/globals.css.

items.name: login-01
items.title: Login 01
items.description: Classic email + password centered with remember-me and forgot-link.

items.name: login-02
items.title: Login 02
items.description: Email + password with social SSO row (Google + Apple) above the form.

items.name: login-03
items.title: Login 03
items.description: Split-screen with branded hero panel + testimonial on the left.

items.name: signup-01
items.title: Signup 01
items.description: Name + email + phone + password centered form with T&C checkbox.

items.name: signup-02
items.title: Signup 02
items.description: Social SSO row above email signup form.

items.name: signup-03
items.title: Signup 03
items.description: Split-screen with feature bullets in left hero panel.

items.name: forgot-password-01
items.title: Forgot Password 01
items.description: Email-only reset request form with back-to-login link.

items.name: verification-otp
items.title: Verification OTP
items.description: 6-digit OTP via InputOTP with resend timer.

items.name: password-input
items.title: Password Input
items.description: Password field with leading lock icon and eye / eye-off visibility toggle. Wraps InputRoot + Input + InputIcon.

items.name: brand-mark
items.title: Brand Mark
items.description: Header element for auth screens — 56×56 round filled with brand colour (Aurora/Solaris/Phoenix/Apex) or 96×96 rounded-square neutral surface (Key icon variant).

items.name: auth-register-aurora
items.title: Auth Register Aurora
items.description: source Aurora — brand mark → single Google SSO → OR divider → first/last/email/password form → FancyButton CTA → footer link.

items.name: auth-register-solaris
items.title: Auth Register Solaris
items.description: source Solaris — brand mark → 2 stacked SSO (Google + Apple) → OR divider → single email → FancyButton CTA → footer.

items.name: auth-login-phoenix
items.title: Auth Login Phoenix
items.description: source Phoenix — brand mark → email + password (inline forgot) → FancyButton CTA → OR divider → 2 side-by-side SSO → footer.

items.name: auth-login-apex
items.title: Auth Login Apex
items.description: source Apex — brand mark → 3 side-by-side SSO (Google/Apple/Microsoft) → OR divider → email + password → remember + forgot → FancyButton CTA → footer.

items.name: auth-login-key
items.title: Auth Login (Key icon)
items.description: source Login Key — 96×96 key-icon header → email + password → remember + forgot → FancyButton CTA. Minimal no-SSO variant.

items.name: auth-register-key
items.title: Auth Register (Key icon)
items.description: source Register Key — 96×96 key-icon header → first/last/email/password → FancyButton CTA → T&C / privacy legal copy.

items.name: auth-reset-password-key
items.title: Auth Reset Password (Key icon)
items.description: source Reset Password Key — 96×96 key-icon header → email → FancyButton CTA → support link.

items.name: auth-verification-key
items.title: Auth Verification (Key icon)
items.description: source Verification Key — 96×96 shield-icon header → 4-digit OTP grid → FancyButton CTA (disabled until complete) → resend link.

items.name: transactions-table
items.title: Transactions Table
items.description: Filter row + transaction rows with status badge + amount + Pagination.

items.name: team-grid
items.title: Team Grid
items.description: Avatar grid with role + tribe tags + live status indicator.

items.name: orders-table
items.title: Orders Table
items.description: Dispatch table with bulk-select row + status filter + multi-action bar.

items.name: products-grid
items.title: Products Grid
items.description: Dispatch pool cards with stock progress + status badge + tribe accent.

items.name: stat-card-grid
items.title: Stat Card Grid
items.description: 3-4 KPI tiles in responsive grid with optional trend deltas.

items.name: empty-state-collection
items.title: Empty State Collection
items.description: 4 empty-state patterns: inbox / search / filter / 404.

items.name: analytics-grid
items.title: Analytics Grid
items.description: KPI strip + Chart row (Area + Bar) — 2-column on desktop.

items.name: audit-history-table
items.title: Audit History Table
items.description: Render edit history for any user-editable legal/financial field. Sortable, filterable, paginated. Per Dash audit trail rule.

items.name: multi-stage-approval
items.title: Multi-Stage Approval
items.description: N-stage approval workflow with sequential gating, role-based action lock, and rollback-or-dead-end rejection. Use for Maintenance, Repossession, Mitra-reinstate, payment-adjustment.

items.name: repossession-action-sheet
items.title: Repossession Action Sheet
items.description: Mobile-first bottom drawer for the 7-state repossession workflow (OPEN/IN_PROGRESS/FOUND/POTENTIAL_LOSS/PENDING_APPROVAL/WRITTEN_OFF/CLOSED). Role-aware actions, required note + optional photos + GPS capture, confirm dialog for irreversible transitions, audit-ready payload.

items.name: activity-timeline
items.title: Activity Timeline
items.description: Vertical timeline with icon + actor + action + meta tag.

items.name: delivery-status-timeline
items.title: Delivery Status Timeline
items.description: Visual timeline for 26-status ts-delivery-service state machine — category-coded badges, current-status pulse, expandable middle, id/en locale.

items.name: my-cards-stack
items.title: My Cards Stack
items.description: Banking-card visualization for mitra payout methods, click to swap.

items.name: settings-profile
items.title: Settings — Profile
items.description: Avatar upload + name/email/phone/bio fields + Save/Cancel footer.

items.name: settings-notifications
items.title: Settings — Notifications
items.description: Switch matrix (email × push × SMS) per event type + DND toggle.

items.name: settings-integrations
items.title: Settings — Integrations
items.description: Cards grid (Slack/WA/Email/BCA/GitHub/BMKG) with connect/disconnect button.

items.name: settings-team
items.title: Settings — Team
items.description: Team member list with role Select + Invite button.

items.name: settings-privacy-security
items.title: Settings — Privacy & Security
items.description: 2FA toggle + active sessions list + password change form.

items.name: mitra-suspend-page
items.title: Mitra Suspend Page
items.description: Halo-dash Ops master/detail for flagged mitra. Compose ListDetailPage + Modal (manual override) + AlertDialog (permanent suspend). Auto Suspend Mitra PRD pattern.

items.name: halo-dash-3pane
items.title: Halo-Dash 3-Pane Shell
items.description: Backoffice support module shell. Sidebar + Resizable 3-pane: ticket list / conversation thread / customer inspector. SLA-aware + composer.

items.name: phase7-results
items.title: Phase 7 Results Dashboard
items.description: Analytics-heavy dashboard for PT Box phase7 results style. KPI grid header + equity curve chart + per-session breakdown table + pain metrics.

items.name: badge-upvote-card
items.title: Badge — Week's Top Contributor
items.description: Ranked contributor list with avatar rows and upvote button (filled when upvoted, stroke otherwise). Ported from Figma Badge [Examples] :: id 2939:19644.

items.name: badge-profile-account
items.title: Badge — Profile Account Dropdown
items.description: User account dropdown with Badge plan indicator (FREE/PRO/TEAM/ENTERPRISE), keyboard shortcut, Dark Mode switch row, and destructive logout. Ported from Figma Badge [Examples] :: id 2950:5586.

items.name: avatar-recipient-selection
items.title: Avatar — Saved Recipients
items.description: Transfer-recipient selection card with avatar rows, account number, keyboard shortcut affordance, and primary New Recipient CTA. Ported from Figma Avatar :: Examples id 2937:14646.

items.name: button-export-settings
items.title: Button — Export Settings Modal
items.description: Settings modal with inline upsell card (NEW Badge + Upgrade CTA), Cancel + Export footer. Ported from Figma Button [Examples] :: id 167874:113157.

items.name: button-email-verification
items.title: Button — Email Verification Modal
items.description: Verification dialog with header icon, 6-slot OTP input, two link-style buttons (Enter code manually / Resend the link), and primary Verify CTA. Ported from Figma Button [Examples] :: id 167874:113174.

items.name: hr-widgets
items.title: HR Widgets
items.description: Six HR Management dashboard widgets ported from Figma Widgets [HR Management] [1.1]: ScheduleWidget, TimeOffWidget, EmployeeSpotlightWidget, TimeTrackerWidget, NotesWidget, StatusTrackerWidget. Each is a card-wrapped composition built on Dash primitives (Card / Avatar / Badge / ProgressBar / IconButton).

items.name: finance-widgets
items.title: Finance Widgets
items.description: Six Finance & Banking dashboard widgets ported from Figma Widgets [Finance & Banking] [1.1]: MyCardsWidget, RecentTransactionsWidget, TotalBalanceWidget, QuickTransferWidget, BudgetOverviewWidget, MySubscriptionsWidget. Card-wrapped compositions on Dash primitives with inline sparkline + bar chart fallback (no external chart lib).

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: Backoffice page-level title block with optional leading slot (avatar / icon / brand / company), search + notification topbar icons, primary controls slot, and action button row. Figma parity Headers [1.1] :: Page Header.

items.name: section-header
items.title: Section Header
items.description: Content-section heading with optional leading slot, inline title compact button (dropdown chevron), search icon, and action button row. Figma parity Headers [1.1] :: Section Header.

items.name: dash-ai-rules
items.title: Dash AI Rules (v3)
items.description: AI assistant rules for working in repos with @dash registry. v3 Adaptation Layer covers 5 FE + 5 BE + 1 infrastructure repo (11 total): per-repo stack mandates, hard bans (RHF/zod/TanStack/Prisma-in-Nest/K8s), pattern-to-stack translation, refactor + auto-inference protocols, 30+ anti-patterns, per-service API envelope discrimination (numeric vs string status), cross-domain SSO trio, code style per BE service, state machines (delivery/maintenance/repossession/vehicle/incident), webhook namespaces (provider_order.* vs delivery-* vs vehicle-*), infrastructure rules (OpenTofu+Cloud Run+WIF+asia-southeast2), drift inventory awareness. Install to ./CLAUDE.md (or AGENTS.md / .cursorrules).

items.name: dash-domain-glossary
items.title: Dash Domain Glossary
items.description: Canonical domain entity glossary across all 11 Dash repos (5 FE + 5 BE + 1 infra). Phase 1 (code-inferred, 22 entities) + Phase 1.5 (AGENTS.md verbatim) + Phase 1.7A (ts-delivery: Delivery FSM 26 statuses, AppError, Joi Bahasa, provider_order.* webhooks) + Phase 1.7B (nest-express + nest-fleet Drizzle, fleet entities Vehicle/Handover/Maintenance/Incident/Repossession, infrastructure OpenTofu+Cloud Run) + Phase 1.7C (next-basecamp shadcn+Zustand+Firebase, react-fleet-management CRA+CRACO+SSO-trio). 30+ entities total, state machines (delivery/maintenance/repossession/vehicle/incident), BE envelope discrimination (numeric vs string status), drift inventory (Dash team action items). Drop into consumer repo so AI agents know entity shapes + endpoints + conventions without re-reading repos.

items.name: animated-alert
items.title: Animated Alert
items.description: Soft animated alert with shake/pulse on mount. Multiple tones (info / success / warning / error). Ported from Dash Next Portal v2.

items.name: announcement-bar
items.title: Announcement Bar
items.description: Top-of-page promo / sandbox banner. Marquee variant available. Dismissable.

items.name: information-banner
items.title: Information Banner
items.description: Multi-slide informational carousel banner. Used for product updates, onboarding hints, and contextual help.

items.name: fancy-loader
items.title: Fancy Loader
items.description: Branded multi-color loader for full-screen / page-level loading states.

items.name: spinner-loader
items.title: Spinner Loader
items.description: Simple spinner with size + tone variants. Use for inline button loading + small UI placeholders.

items.name: shimmer
items.title: Shimmer
items.description: Content placeholder shimmer for skeleton-style loading. Animates a soft gradient sweep across the bounding box.

items.name: availability-status
items.title: Availability Status
items.description: Green / amber / red dot + status text pill. Use for service / connection / live-status indicators.

items.name: notification-onboarding
items.title: Notification Onboarding
items.description: Popover-based onboarding hint / feature walkthrough tour. Step indicator + skip / next / done CTA.

items.name: theme-switch
items.title: Theme Switch
items.description: 3-state Light / Dark / System theme toggle. Segmented control surface.

items.name: language-select
items.title: Language Select
items.description: Locale picker with country flag + native name. Dropdown trigger.

items.name: upload-card
items.title: Upload Card
items.description: Drag-drop file upload card. Dashed border + paperclip icon + Browse files button. Supported-formats hint.

items.name: shield-crown
items.title: Shield Crown Icon
items.description: Custom Shield with Crown brand SVG icon. Used for trust / admin / verified affordances.

items.name: price-with-discount
items.title: Price With Discount
items.description: Price display with optional strikethrough compare-at and discount badge.

items.name: discount-line-item
items.title: Discount Line Item
items.description: Cart / invoice line item with discount % and total. Compose with PriceWithDiscount.

items.name: empty-state-illustration
items.title: Empty State Illustration
items.description: 34 widget-specific 148x148 empty-state SVG illustrations served from /brand/empty-states/. Use inside any widget empty body slot: <EmptyStateIllustration kind="donation-profile" />.

items.name: use-code-field
items.title: Use Code Field
items.description: Single-purpose 6-digit alphanumeric use-code field for delivery dispatch. Auto-generate via genUseCode(), regenerate button, copy-to-clipboard, RHF-wired. Works standalone or nested inside useFieldArray rows.

items.name: multi-item-form
items.title: Multi-Item Form
items.description: Reference pattern: react-hook-form useFieldArray + per-row card + batch submit. Anchors the canonical shape for refactors like 'single-order to multi-order' delivery creation.

items.name: bulk-submit
items.title: Bulk Submit
items.description: Pattern for batch endpoint dispatch. Per-row status (idle/pending/success/error), optimistic UI with rollback on individual failure, per-row retry, end-of-run summary toast.

items.name: bulk-upload-with-status
items.title: Bulk Upload with Per-File Status
items.description: N-file batch upload, parallel with concurrency limit, per-file status + retry, summary toast. Common: delivery proof batch, KYC docs, vehicle photos.

items.name: image-editor-with-audit
items.title: Image Editor with Audit Trail
items.description: Canvas-based crop + rotate for proof images. Audit trail built-in. POD/POP/KYC/vehicle-condition support. No external image lib.

items.name: inline-edit-with-audit
items.title: Inline Edit with Audit Trail
items.description: Click-to-edit single-field block. Save/cancel + optional reason, validation, char cap, custom read renderer. Audit payload mandatory. For mitra display name, vehicle description, outlet contact, etc.

items.name: mitra-dispute-flow
items.title: Mitra Dispute Flow
items.description: Mitra (driver) dispute submission flow. Evidence display + reason picker + detail + supervisor escalation + confirm modal + audit-trail payload. Delivery/payment/suspension/maintenance.

items.name: surge-multiplier-card
items.title: Surge Multiplier Card
items.description: Real-time surge multiplier indicator for the Dash Ride mitra mobile app. Large multiplier hero, ride-theme accent color band, expiry countdown, IDR earning projection, waiting-order signal. Formal Anda voice. Layer 3 / ride-only.

items.name: driver-assignment-board
items.title: Driver Assignment Board
items.description: Dispatcher split-pane to assign drivers to pending ride requests. Lazy-loaded driver list per request, distance + rating + acceptance-rate filter, bulk auto-match toggle, audit-trail payload via onAssign callback. Layer 3 / ride-only.

items.name: polygon-shift-map
items.title: Polygon Shift Map
items.description: Mitra positioning vs polygon-shift supply table. Per-zone saturation classifier (under/balanced/over), point-in-polygon mitra count, broadcast-bonus action for under-supplied zones (audit-trail via onBroadcastBonus). No map library dep — table mode default, external map adapter optional. Layer 3 / ride-only.

items.name: proof-image-viewer
items.title: Proof Image Viewer
items.description: Display proof image (POD/POP/KYC/vehicle-condition) with native zoom + pan + side-by-side compare (original vs edited). Audit history cycling, geolocation map link, keyboard a11y. No external zoom lib.

items.name: incident-form-with-attach
items.title: Incident Form with Attachments
items.description: Incident report form (vehicle accident, mitra injury, customer complaint) with photo/PDF attachments. Role-gated type dropdown, formal 'Anda' voice for mitra-facing, audit-ready payload, OPEN-state entry to incident lifecycle.

items.name: payment-receipt-edit
items.title: Payment Receipt Edit
items.description: Edit payment amount on existing receipt/transaction with mandatory audit + Fleet Manager approver gate above Rp 500.000 diff. IDR-cents internally, formatted-as-you-type input, before/after confirm modal. High-stakes financial field.

items.name: route-planner
items.title: Route Planner
items.description: Delivery route planner: N pickup/dropoff stops sorted by ETA, manual reorder override, vehicle-constraint warning (truck-large in gang sempit), distance + ETA summary, audit-trail assignment payload. Caller owns TSP solver via onOptimize. Layer 3 / logistic-only.

items.name: batch-dispatch-grid
items.title: Batch Dispatch Grid
items.description: Bulk N-packages × M-drivers assignment grid: per-cell toggle, multi-select + bulk-assign, per-driver capacity meter with warning threshold, zone-proximity auto-suggest, conflict highlight on over-capacity, confirm modal with per-driver summary, audited bulk submit. Layer 3 / logistic-only.

items.name: package-tracking-timeline
items.title: Package Tracking Timeline
items.description: Logistic overlay over the shared 26-status delivery-status-timeline. Hero tracking number + status badge + live-ticking ETA countdown, COD panel with collection status, proof image thumbnail grid (opens shared proof-image-viewer), recipient panel with mobile call button. Read-only mitra/customer-facing view. Layer 3 / logistic-only.

items.name: widget-shell
items.title: Widget Shell
items.description: Layer-1 dashboard widget primitive: rounded card container with header (title + optional controls), body, and optional 'See all' footer. Used by every Dash dashboard widget (HR, Finance, Marketing). Hover lift + accent ring tinted by active Layer-2 theme.
